key_requirements: Agent trait (run, run_with_handler) — ReviewAgent implements this or TypedAgent
Agent builder pattern — CRRCycle and ReviewAgent follow same builder convention
Agent execution loop — CRR wraps multiple agent runs in a loop
LLMProvider trait — ReviewAgent calls complete() or complete_structured()
Module structure — agents/review/ fits in agents module

notes: CRR pattern is NEW — no existing spec covers it. ReviewAgent, ReviewVerdict, CRRCycle are all new types. The cclab-sdd CRR implementation is in cclab-sdd crate (separate), used as design reference but not a spec dependency.
